title: Pruning Safety Model

what_happens_when_removed_from_sitemap.pages_stay_live: YES — sitemap removal doesn't delete pages. Users navigating to /guides/how-to-use-basic-calculator will still load the page.
what_happens_when_removed_from_sitemap.pages_stay_indexable: YES — no noindex tag added. Google can still discover and index these pages via internal links.
what_happens_when_removed_from_sitemap.internal_links_unchanged: YES — /all-pages, parent calculators, and cross-links remain intact.
what_happens_when_removed_from_sitemap.only_signal_removed: YES — only the 'this URL is in the sitemap' signal is removed. Google can still find pages via crawling.

estimated_effects.crawl_demand_reduction: POSITIVE — Google crawls 183 fewer thin pages per sitemap refresh. More crawl budget for high-value pages.
estimated_effects.impressions_risk: NEAR-ZERO — removed URLs have 0 impressions. No traffic to lose.
estimated_effects.money_page_support_risk: VERY LOW — guides link TO calculators, not the reverse. Calculators don't depend on guides for authority.
estimated_effects.rollback_difficulty: TRIVIAL — remove the exclusion list from sitemap.ts, redeploy. ~5 minute revert.
estimated_effects.expected_dni_effect: POSITIVE — 183 URLs removed from sitemap means they won't appear as 'discovered-not-indexed' in GSC. DNI count should drop by ~183.
estimated_effects.expected_google_trust_effect: POSITIVE — cleaner sitemap signals quality focus. Google sees fewer thin pages, more high-value ones.

recommendation: APPROVE_FULL_183_REMOVAL — risk is near-zero. All 183 have 0 impressions and 0 clicks. Pages stay live. Reversible in minutes.
